# Vendored browser libraries

These files are pinned and embedded into `grok_switch.exe` for offline rendering:

- `marked.umd.js`: marked 18.0.6, MIT, https://github.com/markedjs/marked
- `purify.min.js`: DOMPurify 3.4.12, MPL-2.0 OR Apache-2.0, https://github.com/cure53/DOMPurify
- `mermaid.min.js`: Mermaid 11.16.0, MIT, https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid
- `highlight.min.js` and `highlight-github.min.css`: Highlight.js 11.11.1, BSD-3-Clause, https://github.com/highlightjs/highlight.js
- `katex/`: KaTeX 0.18.0, MIT, https://github.com/KaTeX/KaTeX
